paper_title: Epiphytic Diatom Sampling and Analysis in Piraquara II Reservoir

methods.description: Process for collecting epiphytic diatoms from emergent macrophytes in the Piraquara II reservoir to study their distribution and frequency.

steps.description: Epiphytic diatoms were sampled in June and November 2013 from stems of the emergent macrophytes.
steps.searchable_summary: collect diatom samples from macrophyte stems

steps.description: Diatoms were scrapped off the substrates surfaces with an aluminium spatule, and the samples were cleaned with KMnO4 and HCl.
steps.searchable_summary: clean diatom samples using KMnO4 and HCl

methods.description: Preparation and analysis of diatom samples using light and scanning electron microscopy to identify and document diatom species.

steps.description: Light microcopy-slides were mounted with Naphrax and analyzed under Olympus BX40 microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and analyze slides using light microscopy

steps.description: Illustrations were captured by DP71 digital equipment.
steps.searchable_summary: capture microscopy images using digital equipment

steps.description: Cleaned samples were prepared and analyzed at JEOL JSM 6360LV scanning electron microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze samples using scanning electron microscopy

methods.description: Establishing frequencies of occurrence for diatom species based on collected samples.

steps.description: Frequencies of occurrence were established based on Mateucci & Colma (1982).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate diatom species frequency of occurrence
